knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: Typecode decoding, product configuration, power ratings, hardware variants, enclosure types, and technical data for VACON 100 family
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: Covers power ranges (0.55–800 kW), voltage ranges, hardware frames, enclosure types, options, and technical specifications. No explicit typecode structure definition found in the provided document.
unresolved_global_gaps: Typecode structure definition NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
Segment-by-segment decoding rules NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS

source_registry.scope_summary: Product overview, variants, power ratings, voltage ranges, technical data, options and hardware configurations
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Hardware frame sizes (MR4–MR12, MM4–MM6) linked to ratings
Variants INDUSTRIAL, FLOW, and 100 X are distinguished functionally
Loadability categories defined: low loadability (110%) and high loadability (150%)
Enclosure types: IP21, IP54, IP00, IP66

technical_tables.table_name: 525-690V Power ratings for VACON 100 INDUSTRIAL and FLOW Wall Mounted, Modules and Enclosed Drives

notes: Low loadability at 40°C and high loadability at 50°C defined

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Last numeric suffix in typecode corresponds to voltage class: '-2' = 208-240 Vac, '-5' = 380-500 Vac, '-6' = 525-600 Vac, '-7' = 525-690 Vac
Typecodes ending with '-X' correspond to VACON 100 X decentral drive variant
Motor power must be retrieved by exact match of full typecode in voltage-specific technical tables
required_additional_conditions: Voltage class must be determined first
Loadability type (IL or IH) must be selected

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Frame size (MR4–MR12 or MM4–MM6) is determined by lookup from technical tables using full typecode
Enclosure type (IP21/IP54/IP00/IP66) is not encoded directly in typecode; must be determined from product variant and configuration selection
required_additional_conditions: Check installation type (wall mounted, module, enclosed)

constraints.exact_rule: VACON 0100-3L-0386-5 and VACON 0100-3L-0262-6 and VACON 0100-3L-0262-7 not available in IP54
Low loadability defined as 110% for 1 min/10 min; high loadability defined as 150% for 1 min/10 min
Derating applies above 40°C: 1.5% per °C for standard drives, 2.5% per °C for VACON 100 X

decoded_breakdown: Motor power: 0.55 kW (low load) / 0.37 kW (high load)
notes: Exact segment mapping NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS

decoded_breakdown: Motor power: 15 kW (low load) / 11 kW (high load)
